queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of negative checking account balances to increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical significance of minimal savings balances in reducing credit default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers associated with the absence of a checking account and increased default probability.
